cer 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Methodology: hand-computed worked examples
    • NGER scope reconciliation: Scope 1 vs Scope 2 vs Climate Active
    • Offsets integrity primer: reading ACCUs after the Chubb Review
    • RET compliance primer: LGCs, STCs, and the shortfall charge
    • Safeguard Mechanism reform: pre- vs post-1 July 2023
  • Changelog

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Charles Coverdale. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Coverdale, C. (2026). cer: Download and Tidy Australian Clean Energy Regulator Data. R package version 0.1.0. https://cran.r-project.org/package=cer

@Manual{,
  title = {cer: Download and Tidy Australian Clean Energy Regulator Data},
  author = {Charles Coverdale},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://cran.r-project.org/package=cer},
}

Chubb, I. (2022). Independent Review of Australian Carbon Credit Units. Commonwealth of Australia.

@TechReport{,
  title = {Independent Review of Australian Carbon Credit Units},
  author = {Ian Chubb},
  institution = {Commonwealth of Australia},
  year = {2022},
}

Macintosh, A., Butler, D., Larraondo, P., Evans, M.C., Ansell, D., Gibbons, P., Lindenmayer, D., Waschka, M. and Fisher, R. (2022). The emperor's new clothes: assessing the integrity of ACCUs. Australian National University.

@TechReport{,
  title = {The emperor's new clothes: assessing the integrity of ACCUs},
  author = {Andrew Macintosh and Don Butler and Pablo Larraondo and Megan C. Evans and Dean Ansell and Philip Gibbons and David Lindenmayer and Marie Waschka and Rod Fisher},
  institution = {Australian National University},
  year = {2022},
}

@Manual{,
